supersededArtifacts.rationale: The single exploratory bootstrap prompt has been replaced by explicit per-phase handoffs and orchestrator prompts.

keyDecisions: @beep/semantic-web is the canonical semantic-web foundation package
JSON-LD is first-class in the initial package surface
the package posture is foundation plus adapters
IRI and ProvO are seed assets, not the whole package design
ontology builder DSL work remains experimental
Schema.toEquivalence is the default equality surface for schema-modeled domain values
Graph is projection-only and not the primary RDF semantic model
Hash and Equal are not RDF semantic identity
JsonPatch and JsonPointer are JSON-LD document-layer tools only
generic XML encoding is not RDF/XML
PROV-O is the interoperable provenance backbone, paired with explicit evidence anchoring and bounded projections
IRI and URI remain separate public concepts in v1, with IRI as the semantic default
Web Annotation is an adapter seam, not a hard package-wide dependency
SemanticSchemaMetadata.kind is a closed intentionally coarse literal domain in v1
openQuestions: Should idna/ remain internal to uri/ in v1 or be promoted to a first-class public submodule?
Should JSON-LD framing be part of the initial public surface or stay optional until a concrete caller exists?
Should Comunica remain a research-only reference in v1 or move into a later adapter-target role if stronger local evidence appears?
Will temporary @beep/schema re-exports be needed during seed-asset migration?
